    Daily Summaries

    Portal: Galaxy Clusters & Large-Scale Structure

    An organized entry point to articles about galaxy clusters, group environments, and the large-scale cosmic web — from cluster plasma physics to infall kinematics.

    Notable Clusters

    • Coma Cluster — Archetypal rich galaxy cluster
    • Perseus Cluster — Nearby cool-core cluster with AGN jets

    Groups & Large-Scale Structure

    • Galaxy Groups — Intermediate-mass environments
    • Cluster Substructures — Merging subclusters and sub-halos
    • Subcluster Formation — Assembly of cluster components
    • NFW Profile — Dark matter halo density profile

    Cluster Physics

    • Sunyaev-Zel'dovich Effect — CMB distortion by hot ICM
    • Baryon Fraction in Clusters — Gas and stellar mass balance
    • Ram Pressure Stripping — Gas removal by ICM
    • Dynamical Relaxation — Virialisation timescales
    • Butcher-Oemler Effect — Galaxy evolution in clusters with redshift

    Kinematics & Mass Estimation

    • Cluster Mass Estimation — X-ray, SZ, lensing, kinematics
    • MAMPOSSt / MG-MAMPOSSt — Orbit modelling mass estimator
    • Projected Phase Space — Radial velocity vs. offset diagrams
    • Orbital Anisotropy — Isotropic vs. radial orbits

    AGN & Jets in Clusters

    • AGN Feedback — Jet-mode heating of the ICM
    • Bondi Accretion — Hot gas accretion onto the BCG black hole
    • Jet-Cocoon Dynamics — Mechanical energy injection
    • 3C 84 / NGC 1275 — Perseus BCG jet system
    • RIAF / ADAF Models — Radiatively inefficient accretion

    Plasma & Shock Physics

    • Shock Waves — ICM shocks in merging clusters
    • Diffusive Shock Acceleration — Particle energisation at shocks
    • Recollimation Shocks — Internal jet shocks
    • Faraday Rotation — Magnetic field probe via polarimetry
    • Magnetohydrodynamics — ICM plasma dynamics

    Observational Methods

    • VLBI Polarimetry — Milliarcsecond-scale magnetic field mapping
    • Polarimetry — Magnetic field orientation measurement
    • DESI Survey — Wide-field spectroscopic cluster kinematics

    Recent Papers

    • Pedratti et al. (2026) — Coma Cluster kinematics and mass profile with DESI
    • Park et al. (2026) — Faraday rotation measure of 3C 84 / NGC 1275 jet
    • Peretti et al. (2026) — Particle acceleration at recollimation shocks in AGN jets
